assertions.title: Personalization Sliders Persist

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:9002 and expand Personalization panel
steps.observed: 6 dimension weight sliders visible, all at 50

steps.action: Change Geopolitical slider to 75 via keyboard (Home then 75x ArrowRight)
steps.observed: Slider value changed to 75

steps.action: Change Infrastructure slider to 30 via keyboard
steps.observed: Slider value changed to 30
Slider value changed to 80

steps.action: Refresh page and reopen Personalization panel
steps.observed: Geopolitical=75, Infrastructure=30, Economic=80 — all persisted
Values stored in localStorage key 'threat-radar-personalization' as JSON with weights object

evidence.network: No API calls — persistence via localStorage

assertions.issues: Slider labels differ from spec: spec mentions 'Bluesky weight, Reddit weight, alert intensity' but implementation has dimension weight sliders (Geopolitical, Infrastructure, Economic, Security, Climate, Technology). Core persistence functionality works correctly regardless of label names.

steps.action: Search DOM for critical thinking section
steps.observed: Found section.ct-section with class 'ct-section' containing 4 subsections

steps.action: Scroll to Critical Thinking Rails section
steps.expected: Guidance text about source evaluation, bias, narrative collapse visible
steps.observed: Section visible with heading 'Critical Thinking Rails' and 4 subsections
'Evaluate Sources Critically' — discusses provenance, incentives, cross-referencing
'Recognize Cognitive Biases' — mentions confirmation bias, anchoring, availability heuristic
'Resist Narrative Collapse' — discusses binary frames, multiple options
'Uncertainty Is Information' — discusses model disagreement as signal

assertions.title: Action Feed with Time-Bounded Suggestions

steps.action: Locate action feed section in DOM
steps.expected: Action feed with at least one time-bounded suggestion
steps.observed: Action feed section found (div.af-feed) but displays empty state: 'No action suggestions yet. Collect signals and they will populate here.'

steps.action: Check for any action items or time labels
steps.expected: At least one action item with time horizon label
steps.observed: Zero action items found, zero time labels found

assertions.issues: Action feed shows empty state with message 'No action suggestions yet. Collect signals and they will populate here.' No time-bounded suggestions (24h/week/coordination) are displayed. This appears to be because no ConnectionOpportunity/ActionCard data has been generated by the backend, so the action feed has nothing to render.

steps.action: Expand Personalization panel and identify toggles
steps.expected: 3 toggle switches visible: Agency Bias, Critical Thinking, Federation
steps.observed: 3 switches found: Agency Bias (off), Critical Thinking (off), Federation (on/checked)
Agency Bias toggled to ON (checked=true)
Critical Thinking toggled to ON (checked=true). Critical Thinking Rails section shows 'ACTIVE' badge.
Federation toggled to OFF (checked=false)
localStorage shows agencyBias:true, criticalThinking:true, federation:false

evidence.network: No API calls — persistence via localStorage

steps.observed: localStorage cleared, cookies cleared
Dashboard loaded with title 'Threat Radar Wall', default settings applied
3 lanes found: lane-eta, lane-mu, lane-pi

steps.action: Verify at least one radar displayed
steps.expected: At least one radar clock/gauge visible
steps.observed: Multiple radar cards visible: VAL PROC-005 Test Radar (η), VAL PROC-004 Test Radar (η), Integration Test Radar (Π)
No console errors

assertions.title: Single-Page Layout — All Lanes Reachable Without Navigation

steps.action: Check DOM for all 3 lane containers on initial load
steps.observed: 3 .lane elements found: lane-eta, lane-mu, lane-pi
Zero nav links found (navLinkCount: 0)

steps.action: Set viewport to 1920x1080 and verify all lanes visible
steps.expected: All 3 lanes visible in single layout
steps.observed: All 3 lanes visible side-by-side in wide viewport
URL is http://localhost:9002/ — unchanged

frictions.description: Personalization slider labels differ from validation contract spec: spec mentions 'Bluesky weight, Reddit weight, alert intensity' but actual implementation provides dimension weight sliders (Geopolitical, Infrastructure, Economic, Security, Climate, Technology). The underlying persistence mechanism works correctly.
frictions.resolution: Tested with actual slider implementation — persistence via localStorage works for all 6 dimension weight sliders

frictions.description: React controlled inputs required keyboard-based interaction (Home/ArrowRight) instead of direct value setting for sliders. Direct DOM value manipulation via JavaScript did not trigger React state updates.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser focus + keyboard Home/ArrowRight to set slider values, which correctly triggers React onChange handlers

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed. VAL-UI-007 (Action Feed) fails because the action feed shows an empty state with no time-bounded suggestions — the backend has not generated ConnectionOpportunity/ActionCard data to populate it. All other assertions pass: personalization sliders persist via localStorage (VAL-UI-005), critical thinking section displays comprehensive guidance (VAL-UI-006), all 3 toggles are functional (VAL-ERR-003), first-visit flow renders correctly with default config (VAL-CROSS-005), and the single-page layout has all 3 lanes present without navigation (VAL-CROSS-006).
